name: iris-prettier-vscode
description: Prettier-style formatter for InterSystems IRIS ObjectScript (.cls)

commands.title: IRIS Prettier: 格式化当前方法
IRIS Prettier: 格式化选定内容
IRIS Prettier: 转换选定内容语法
IRIS Prettier: 预览语法转换
IRIS Prettier: Convert Dot Syntax to Block
IRIS Prettier: Format + Convert Dot to Block

editor/context.when: editorLangId == objectscript-class || editorLangId == objectscript || editorLangId == objectscript-int || editorLangId == objectscript-macros
editorLangId == objectscript-class || editorLangId == objectscript || editorLangId == objectscript-int || editorLangId == objectscript-macros
!editorHasSelection && (editorLangId == objectscript-class || editorLangId == objectscript || editorLangId == objectscript-int || editorLangId == objectscript-macros)
editorHasSelection && (editorLangId == objectscript-class || editorLangId == objectscript || editorLangId == objectscript-int || editorLangId == objectscript-macros)
editorHasSelection && (editorLangId == objectscript-class || editorLangId == objectscript || editorLangId == objectscript-int || editorLangId == objectscript-macros)

irisPrettier.enable.description: Enable IRIS Prettier formatting for ObjectScript files.

irisPrettier.printWidth.description: Maximum line width before wrapping concatenations.

irisPrettier.useTabs.description: Use tabs for indentation inside method bodies.

irisPrettier.tabWidth.description: Indent width per level when useTabs is false (IRIS default: 4 spaces per tab).

irisPrettier.formatPostfixConditions.description: Postfix q:/s:/continue:: add spaces inside (...) only; leave unparenthesized conditions unchanged.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @iris-prettier/core && node scripts/sync-core.mjs && node scripts/bundle.mjs
scripts.build:tsc: npm run build -w @iris-prettier/core && node scripts/sync-core.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json
